tool_args: Naive all-stations annual rainfall for Oahu, ranked driest first
tool_result_summary: 2022 = 935mm (36.8in), 54 stations. But 2010 had 124 stations — suspicious composition change.

tool_args: Year-by-year station count for Oahu historical rainfall
tool_result_summary: Station count dropped from ~125 (2019) to 54 (2022). Major structural break.

tool_args: GET /stations?q={name:hcdp_station_metadata} — extract Oahu stations with network field
tool_result_summary: 760 Oahu stations across 17 networks. COOP=102, STATE=475, USGS=76, HydroNet=29, RAWS=17, HiMesonet=10, etc.

tool_args: Network breakdown by year for Oahu rainfall stations
tool_result_summary: COOP: 46 stations in 2019, 1 in 2022. USGS: 26→10. HydroNet stable at 25-26. RAWS stable at 12-16. Entire COOP network vanished.

tool_args: Build reference panel: stations with >=20/26 years AND reporting in 2022
tool_result_summary: 41 stations qualified. Networks: HydroNet 20, RAWS 11, USGS 8, NWS 2. Zero COOP.

tool_args: Re-rank years using only the 41-station panel
tool_result_summary: 2022 still #1 driest at 985mm (67.5% of mean). #2 is 2000 at 1127mm (77.3%). 10-point gap — robust.

tool_args: Compute panel long-term mean and deficit stats
tool_result_summary: Mean=1458mm, 2022=985mm (67.5%), deficit=473mm. Gap to #2 is 10 percentage points.

tool_args: US Drought Monitor Hawaii Oahu 2022 drought conditions
tool_result_summary: USDM confirms: nearly 100% of Hawaii under drought by Sep 2022, ~1/3 at D2+, federal ag disaster declarations in every county.
